creator: moiseev@mezonplus.ru
text:
- Switch to sysutils/p5-File-Listing from www/p5-libwww dependency
- Convert to new options framework
- Trim Makefile header
- Bump PORTREVISION

- Source code related patches:
  * Lib.pm, Text.pm: fix deprecated usage of qw(...) as parentheses
  * config.pl: remove "-N" smbclient option
  * BackupPC_zipCreate: fix filenames encoding
  * CGI: add Zip archive "Code page" option

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
